summary: A Go-based monolithic project featuring a test runner, schema validation, and MCP handlers, heavily utilizing automated agent-driven test generation.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test files may lead to test bloat
scattered test directories across GOrchestra/glm-agents paths indicate complex CI/agent orchestration
1 staged file suggests incomplete commit or merge in progress
suggestions: consolidate or clean up archived agent test directories to reduce repository clutter
review test coverage overlap between baseline and extra tests
ensure MCP handlers have comprehensive integration tests beyond unit tests
